'''dhihevæsh''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sun|sun]]". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-h-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sun|sun]]
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhihevæsh
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæhævæth|dhæhævæth]] || [[word:dhæhævæj|dhæhævæj]] || [[word:dhæhævæsh|dhæhævæsh]] || [[word:dhæhævæ|dhæhævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhahahavath|dhahahavath]] || [[word:dhahahavaj|dhahahavaj]] || [[word:dhahahavash|dhahahavash]] || [[word:dhahahava|dhahahava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhahavath|dhahavath]] || [[word:dhahavaj|dhahavaj]] || [[word:dhahavash|dhahavash]] || [[word:dhahava|dhahava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhahafvath|dhahafvath]] || [[word:dhahafvaj|dhahafvaj]] || [[word:dhahafvash|dhahafvash]] || [[word:dhahafvaf|dhahafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhahavatha|dhahavatha]] || [[word:dhahavaja|dhahavaja]] || [[word:dhahavasha|dhahavasha]] || [[word:dhahavaka|dhahavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhahavath|dhahavath]] || [[word:dhahavaj|dhahavaj]] || [[word:dhahavash|dhahavash]] || [[word:dhahava|dhahava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhahavathal|dhahavathal]] || [[word:dhahavajal|dhahavajal]] || [[word:dhahavashal|dhahavashal]] || [[word:dhahavakal|dhahavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhahavathatha|dhahavathatha]] || [[word:dhahavajaja|dhahavajaja]] || [[word:dhahavashasha|dhahavashasha]] || [[word:dhahavaka|dhahavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhahavathan|dhahavathan]] || [[word:dhahavajan|dhahavajan]] || [[word:dhahavashan|dhahavashan]] || [[word:dhahavakan|dhahavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhahavathaoro|dhahavathaoro]] || [[word:dhahavajaoro|dhahavajaoro]] || [[word:dhahavashaoro|dhahavashaoro]] || [[word:dhahavakaoro|dhahavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
